creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2012-11-10 04:17, Armin Gruner wrote:
> Hi,
>
> I haven't seen the PR earlier, I opened a PR ports/173525
> which bumps the port version to the current upstream release 0.9.6
> (the PODOFO knob works as well)
>
> Cheers & Greetings from Munich
>     Armin

Armin,

Your patch didn't uninstall cleanly because you changed @dirrmtry to 
@dirrm for some shared directories:

===>   Deinstalling calibre-0.9.6
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/mime/packages'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/mime'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/128x128'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/icons'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/gnome/apps'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/gnome'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/desktop-directories'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/applications'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/etc/bash_completion.d'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `calibre-0.9.6'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
[tethys]:/usr/ports/deskutils/calibre>

I have updated the patch and it uninstalls correctly now.  This updated 
one should be committed to update to 0.9.6.

Rusty
